What We Do

Roofing Services Across Dublin

From a single slipped tile to a full re-roof, every job is measured, quoted honestly and finished properly — no shortcuts, no surprises.

Roof Repairs

Leaks, storm damage, slipped and cracked tiles fixed quickly, before small problems become big ones.

Re-Roofing

Complete tile and slate roof replacements, built to see out the next fifty Irish winters.

Flat Roofing

GRP fibreglass and felt flat roof installation and repair for extensions, garages and dormers.

Guttering & Fascias

Seamless gutters, fascias and soffits fitted, repaired or cleared to keep water off your walls.

Chimney & Flashing

Chimney repointing, flashing and lead work to stop leaks right at the source.

Roof Cleaning & Moss Treatment

Moss removal, roof washing and preventative treatment to protect tiles and extend their life.

The Difference

Before & After

Watch a real Casey & Sons job go from tired and worn to fully transformed.

Before & After
Featured Project

Full Roof Transformation

One of our recent jobs captured from start to finish — the old, worn covering stripped right back and rebuilt into a clean, watertight roof that's ready for decades of Irish weather.

Every project gets the same treatment: honest advice up front, quality materials, tidy workmanship and a site left spotless when we're done.

Why Casey & Sons

A Local Crew You Can Actually Reach

No call centre, no subcontractor chain — just a family roofing business that stands behind its own work.

01

Family-Run, Generational Trade

Casey & Sons was built on hands-on roofing knowledge passed down and applied on every roof we touch.

02

Fully Insured & Guaranteed

Every job is covered by public liability insurance and backed by our workmanship guarantee.

03

Straight-Talking Quotes

You'll get a clear, honest price before any work starts — no inflated call-out fees or hidden extras.

04

You Deal Directly With James

From the first phone call to the final tile, you're speaking to the person doing the work.

About Us

Meet the Owner

Casey & Sons was built on a simple idea: do the job the way you'd want it done on your own roof. James leads every job personally, whether it's a single slipped tile or a full re-roof, and that same standard hasn't changed since day one.

We're a small, family-run crew, which means no call centres and no subcontractor chains — just direct contact with the person doing the work, from your first phone call through to the final walk-around.
